claim: Information system accounts must be reviewed at least annually.
source_clauses: Information system accounts must be reviewed at least annually.
Account types include individual, shared, group, and system accounts.

claim: Audit records must be retained for one year after creation.
source_clauses: Audit records must be retained for one year after creation.
Audit records support after-the-fact investigations.

claim: Cryptographic keys must use FIPS-validated modules.
source_clauses: Cryptographic keys must use FIPS-validated modules.
Key management procedures address generation, distribution, and destruction.

claim: Privileged users must use separate accounts for privileged tasks.
source_clauses: Privileged users must use separate accounts for privileged tasks.
Privileged accounts are subject to enhanced auditing.

claim: Vulnerability scans must be performed at least monthly.
source_clauses: Vulnerability scans must be performed at least monthly.
High-severity vulnerabilities must be remediated within 30 days.

claim: User accounts undergo a minimum yearly review cadence.
source_clauses: Information system accounts must be reviewed at least annually.
Quarterly access recertification is encouraged for high-risk systems.

claim: Logs are kept for 12 months following the date written.
source_clauses: Audit records must be retained for one year after creation.
Log integrity is protected through cryptographic hashing.

claim: Encryption modules adhere to federal validation standards.
source_clauses: Cryptographic keys must use FIPS-validated modules.
FIPS 140-3 compliance is the current baseline.

claim: Admin work uses dedicated identities distinct from daily-use accounts.
source_clauses: Privileged users must use separate accounts for privileged tasks.
Privileged accounts include domain admins, root, and service accounts.

claim: Network scanning is conducted on a 30-day or shorter cycle.
source_clauses: Vulnerability scans must be performed at least monthly.
Authenticated scans uncover additional findings.

claim: Sessions terminate after a defined inactivity period.
source_clauses: The information system terminates user sessions after 15 minutes of inactivity.
Session timeout values are documented in the SSP.

claim: Backups are tested by recovery exercise on a regular basis.
source_clauses: Backup recovery exercises are conducted at least semi-annually.
Test restorations validate recovery time objectives.

claim: Information system accounts may be reviewed at the operator's discretion.
source_clauses: Information system accounts must be reviewed at least annually.
Quarterly access recertification is encouraged for high-risk systems.

claim: Audit records must be retained for at least 30 days after creation.
source_clauses: Audit records must be retained for one year after creation.
Backup tapes follow a separate 7-year retention schedule.

claim: Cryptographic keys must be stored in plaintext for backup recovery.
source_clauses: Cryptographic keys must use FIPS-validated modules.
Key escrow procedures are managed by the security team.

claim: Privileged users may share accounts to streamline operations.
source_clauses: Privileged users must use separate accounts for privileged tasks.
Account sharing is prohibited under any circumstances.

claim: Vulnerability scans should be performed annually for cost reasons.
source_clauses: Vulnerability scans must be performed at least monthly.
Authenticated scans require credentialed access.

claim: Sessions persist indefinitely once authenticated.
source_clauses: The information system terminates user sessions after 15 minutes of inactivity.
Re-authentication is required after session termination.

claim: Backups are not required if redundant storage is in place.
source_clauses: Backup recovery exercises are conducted at least semi-annually.
Off-site backup storage is mandatory for critical systems.

claim: All employees receive a $5000 bonus upon completing security training.
source_clauses: Information system accounts must be reviewed at least annually.
Audit records must be retained for one year after creation.

claim: The CISO position rotates every six months among directors.
source_clauses: Cryptographic keys must use FIPS-validated modules.
Privileged users must use separate accounts for privileged tasks.

claim: Quantum-resistant encryption is provisionally available via Project Sunlight.
source_clauses: Vulnerability scans must be performed at least monthly.
Audit records must be retained for one year after creation.

claim: Annual employee surveys determine which controls remain in scope.
source_clauses: Privileged users must use separate accounts for privileged tasks.
Vulnerability scans must be performed at least monthly.

claim: Office plants must be watered weekly per the security plan.
